title: Read and interpret engineering drawings and determine requirements
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Read and interpret engineering drawings and determine requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Identify symbols, codes, legends and diagrams in engineering drawings 1.2 Identify and interpret manufacturing information, products, systems and components represented in engineering drawings 1.3 Determine work requirements and confirm with appropriate personnel

elements.title: Determine processes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specific customer and job requirements 2.2 Identify required manufacturing processes from drawing, and select materials according to job requirements and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine processes

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Prepare production order according to engineering drawings and workplace procedures3.2 Record engineering drawing outcomes and workplace documents and store engineering drawings according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare production order according to engineering drawings and workplace procedures3.2 Record engineering drawing outcomes and workplace documents and store engineering drawings according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
